overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 following a character with a glowing yellow umbrella through a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk city. The journey traverses narrow alleys, ascends graffiti-covered stairs, crosses an open plaza, and descends into lower-level passages filled with vibrant signage and street vendors.

agents.ego_description: following a character with a glowing yellow umbrella through a narrow alley lined with neon signs and vending machines

notable_agents.action: character with glowing yellow umbrella walking ahead through the alley

entered.detail: red illuminated sign with 'BURRITO' text above a shop front
pink neon archway lighting the left side of the alley
illuminated vending machine with product displays on the right wall
concrete staircase leading upward at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley with vibrant neon signage including a prominent burrito shop. The camera follows a character with a distinctive glowing yellow umbrella walking ahead, passing vending machines and neon-lit doorways toward a staircase at the alley's end.

events.description: entering stairwell and beginning ascent from ground level

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs following the glowing umbrella character, passing walls covered in graffiti

notable_agents.action: ascending stairs ahead with glowing yellow umbrella

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in green and black graffiti tags
exposed metal utility pipes running along the right wall
upper floor balconies with railings visible on the left building

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a narrow concrete stairway flanked by graffiti-covered walls and exposed pipes, following the glowing umbrella character upward. The environment is dimly lit with ambient light from above, transitioning from the commercial alley to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm tree surrounded by commercial buildings and overpass

camera pans around to survey the plaza and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: moving through open plaza, looking around at the surrounding architecture and neon signage

large blue and red sign with 'EMBERS' text on an overpass structure
string of red and white paper lanterns hanging across the right side
large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the right building
square opening in the pavement leading to lower levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a central palm tree and surrounded by towering buildings with balconies. The camera pans to reveal the 'Embers' sign on an overpass structure and paper lanterns strung across the area, with a noticeable hole in the ground leading downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level passage with red ambient lighting and vending areas

events.description: descending through opening in ground to lower level
environment shifts from neutral to red-dominated ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: descending through a hole in the ground into a lower level with red lighting

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near wall in the lower level

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs leading downward through the opening
walls illuminated with red ambient lighting
curved bar counter with stools in the lower level
pair of illuminated vending machines against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera descends through the plaza's opening into a lower-level passage bathed in red ambient light. The environment shifts from open sky to enclosed concrete walls with a bar area and vending machines visible as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with street food vendor and Japanese neon signage

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow alleyway, the camera passes a street food vendor illuminated by bright teal neon lights. The walls are covered with Japanese signage including 24-hour business notices, while the wet pavement reflects the vibrant colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley approaching stairway with NPC activity

events.description: approaching group of NPCs gathered near stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a stairway where several NPCs are gathered near a doorway with pink signage

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow alley toward a stairway where multiple NPCs are gathered. The area features a doorway with pink neon signage, trash bags along the walls, and metal railings as the camera approaches the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban labyrinth that shifts from narrow commercial alleys to an open plaza before descending back into subterranean passages. It begins by trailing a character with a glowing yellow umbrella through a vibrant alley past a burrito shop and vending machines, moving steadily toward a concrete staircase. As the camera ascends the graffiti-covered stairs, the environment transitions from the dim alley to a spacious upper plaza featuring a central palm tree, paper lanterns, and towering balconies. The scene then shifts downward through a hole in the ground, plunging from the open sky into a lower-level passage bathed in red ambient light and enclosed concrete walls. Finally, the camera glides through a wet alleyway past teal-lit street food vendors and Japanese signage, moving toward a gathering of people by a pink neon doorway.
